name: PaymentInstrumentCardholderAndAttribution
description: Stable local provider-neutral payment identities and append-only per-transaction attribution.
schema_def: payment_instrument: id ULID, owner label, optional accountId, optional masked suffix, active lifecycle; full provider identifiers prohibited. cardholder: id ULID, owner label, active lifecycle. transaction_attribution_event: id, transactionId, independent instrument/cardholder known IDs or explicit unknown, action initialize|assign|correct|carry_forward, optional previousEventId/sourceTransactionId/reconciliationDecisionId, required reason, actor, trusted time. Creation appends one initialize event. A statement-authoritative replacement carries prior current attribution only when compatible with corrected account facts; otherwise it appends explicit unknown initialization with the reconciliation decision and returns review metadata. Exactly one active attribution projection exists per transaction; no inference from provider wording, account, pool, category, description, or evidence kind.
